description: A taxpayer discovers they were eligible for a large deduction on a return filed two years ago and wants to file a claim for a refund.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the statute of limitations for claiming a refund has not expired.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the claim is timely (within 3 years of filing).

nodes.task_description: Prepare an amended tax return (Form 1040-X) for the year in question, showing the new deduction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately prepares the amended return.

nodes.task_description: File the Form 1040-X with the IRS to formally claim the refund.
